# GetDevWorks
> AI-powered software development studio. Fullstack, AI integration,
> automation and QA for agencies and startups.

## Services
- Fullstack web development (React, Next.js, Python, Django)
- AI integration (Groq, Gemini, Hugging Face, RAG systems)
- Process automation (n8n, Node-RED, GitHub Actions)
- QA automation (Selenium, Robot Framework, Locust)

## About
Single senior engineer with 7+ years in fintech and healthcare.
Remote. Worldwide. Available for project-based contracts and retainers.
